external_services.service_name: Request for Solicitation from Different Barangays and Organizations
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Solicitation from Different Barangays and Organizations

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Solicitation letter addressed to the Vice Mayor – 1 original copy

steps.client_steps: 1. Submit requirements to the Lipa City Vice Mayor’s Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the requirements and check the availability of the request
steps.person_responsible: Local Legislative Staff Employee I, Local Legislative Staff Employee II, Lipa City Vice Mayor’s Office

steps.agency_action: 1.2. If the requested item is available, grant the request
steps.person_responsible: City Vice Mayor, Lipa City Vice Mayor’s Office

steps.agency_action: 1.3. If the requested item is unavailable, issue a claim stub indicating the date and time of release of request
steps.person_responsible: Local Legislative Staff assistant II, Lipa City Vice Mayor’s Office

steps.client_steps: 2. Return on the given date and claim the request
steps.person_responsible: City Vice Mayor, Lipa City Vice Mayor’s Office
